name: console-get-logs
title: Console / Get Logs
description: Retrieves Unity Editor logs. Useful for debugging and monitoring Unity Editor activity.

parameters.name: maxEntries
parameters.description: Maximum number of log entries to return. Default: 100

parameters.name: logTypeFilter
parameters.description: Filter by log type. ENUM: "Log", "Warning", "Error", "Assert", "Exception". Leave empty for all types.

parameters.name: includeStackTrace
parameters.description: Include stack traces in the output. Default: false

parameters.name: lastMinutes
parameters.description: Return logs from the last N minutes. If 0, returns all available logs. Default: 0
